title: Removal and installation of driver's airbag
section: Driver assistance SRS airbags seat belts

blocks.text: Removal and installation of driver's airbag

items: Proceed with the work while observing work precautions. ​
Disconnect the cable from the minus (-) terminal of the 12V battery and wait at least 3 minutes before starting work.

items.text: If the airbag is deployed, Replace related parts. ​
If the airbag is deployed, Replace related parts. ​
If the airbag is deployed, the cable reel cannot be reused due to heat damage.
If the airbag is deployed, the cable reel cannot be reused due to heat damage.

blocks.text: Remove the Torx bolt (A) using the Torx bit T30 and float the driver's airbag (B) toward you. Disconnect the socket insulator (C) from the terminal (D) and remove the driver's airbag.

items: The socket insulator shall be pulled straight backward, holding the slider.

blocks.text: Installation is the reverse of the removal procedure.

items: Torx bolts cannot be reused because they are coated with threadlocker. When installing, replace with new ones and tighten to the specified torque.

When tightening the driver's airbag, tighten the left and right Torx bolts alternately so that the clearance between the side of the horn pad and the steering wheel is uniform within the standard value.
Check the operation of the horn.

blocks.text: Connect the cable to the (-) terminal of the 12V battery, turn the ignition to the ON mode, and check that the SRS warning light comes on for 6 seconds and then goes off.
